review_method: manual visual review by Codex from batch contact sheets and combined pool contact sheet
criteria: preserve AI51 short pink bob, face, blue eyes and anime style
preserve brown leather jacket, white shirt, blue tie, brown leather skirt, visible belt, blue socks and brown boots
reject malformed anatomy, double heads, bad crops, dirty backgrounds, ghosting, transparency, long-coat drift, wrong garment, or severe chibi collapse
prefer useful view variation: front, side, three-quarter, action, crouch, jump and back views
